name: Savory Braised Short Ribs
recipeInstructions:
-------------------------GARNISHES-------------------------
1 x Tomato Wedges
1 x Sprigs Parsley
---------------------HORSERADISH SAUCE---------------------
1/4 cup Dairy Sour Cream
1 tablespoon Prepared Mustard
2 1/2 tablespoons Prepared Horseradish
1/8 teaspoon Salt
1. Trim any excess fat from the short ribs.
2. Brown the short ribs well on all sides (about 30 minutes) in a Dutch oven over medium heat. Pour off the drippings.
3. Add broth, onion, 1 cup water, peppercorns, Worcestershire sauce, garlic, and bay leaf to the pot. Bring to a boil; reduce heat, cover, and cook slowly for 2 to 2 1/2 hours or until tender, turning once.
4. Meanwhile, prepare the Horseradish Sauce by combining sour cream, horseradish, mustard, and salt in a small bowl. Cover and refrigerate.
5. Remove short ribs from the pot and place on a serving platter. Skim any fat from the cooking liquid.
6. Combine flour with 1/2 cup water to form a smooth mixture. Add this to the cooking liquid, stirring constantly until thickened, reduce heat, and cook slowly for 3 minutes.
7. Strain if necessary and serve with short ribs.
8. Garnish the platter with tomato wedges and parsley.
9. Serve Horseradish Sauce with short ribs.
